body.body: Build PROC_DECIDED habit chain: on /decided, write decision to docs_entries (decisions_log), flush to Igor memory, run docs_sync. Eliminates savestate Steps 0.5+2 as manual batched work. See T-proc-9 reference in decided/SKILL.md.
body.title: PROC_DECIDED habit — /decided fires per-decision not batched at end
body.result: decision_manager.py: atomic DSB+DB+Igor flush; /decided + /savestate skills updated. Tests: none.
